items.section: Part 4. Client's Consent to Representation and Signature

options.label: I have requested the representation of and consented to being represented by the attorney or accredited representative named in Part 1 of this form. According to the Privacy Act of 1974 and DHS policy, I also consent to the disclosure to the named attorney or accredited representative of any record pertaining to me that appears in any system of records of USCIS, ICE, or CBP.
I have limited the scope of representation to the matter(s) described in Part 9.

items.section: Part 4. Client's Consent to Representation and Signature
items.form_text: Receipt of Original Notices and/or Secure Identity Documents
items.instruction: Selecting an option in Item Number 2 is optional. USCIS will send notices to both you and the attorney/accredited representative regardless.

options.label: I request that USCIS send original notices regarding my application(s) or petition(s) to me at the U.S. business address of the attorney or accredited representative named in Part 1.
I request that USCIS send original notices regarding my application(s) or petition(s) to me at my U.S. mailing address.

items.section: Part 4. Client's Consent to Representation and Signature

options.label: I request that USCIS send any secure identity document(s) issued to me at the U.S. business address of the attorney or accredited representative named in Part 1.
I request that USCIS send any secure identity document(s) issued to me at my U.S. mailing address.

items.section: Part 4. Client's Consent to Representation and Signature

excluded_sections.name: Client's Declaration and Authorization
excluded_sections.reason: Declaration paragraphs are declarative text tied to the client's signature, not separate fillable fields.
